summary: The implementation successfully addresses most requirements. REQ-1, REQ-2, and REQ-4 are fully implemented. However, REQ-3 requests smooth scroll behavior to sections within the page, but the implementation uses hash-based navigation that redirects to different pages rather than scrolling within the home page.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement smooth scroll behavior when clicking navigation icons on the home page to scroll to the corresponding section
missing_requirements.reason: The navigation icons use hash-based routing (e.g., '#scanner', '#identify') which triggers page navigation to different components (EducationalContent) rather than smooth scrolling within the HomePage. The acceptance criteria require 'scrolls to the target section' and 'smooth scroll animation', but the implementation navigates away from the home page entirely.

hallucinated_features.description: Hero section with dual pest control icons displayed on the home page
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest mentions 'welcoming introduction' but does not specify displaying two image icons (bed-bug-icon and bed-bugs-quick-tip-icon) in a hero section. While this enhances the welcome experience, it was not explicitly requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Color-coded navigation cards with hover effects and scale transitions
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirement asks for 'clear visual indicators' and 'distinct icons', but the implementation adds specific color schemes (blue, green, amber, purple, red, indigo, teal) with background colors, hover shadows, and scale animations that were not specified in the requirements.
